name: Tigris Uranium Corp.
description: Tigris Uranium Corp. was a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of uranium properties. The company held interests in uranium projects located in the United States, specifically in McKinley County, New Mexico, including the Crownpoint, Hosta Butte, and McKinley properties. Tigris Uranium Corp. has since undergone corporate changes and is historically associated with the entity now known as enCore Energy Corp. The company operated as a junior resource issuer listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, primarily dedicated to advancing its uranium assets through exploration and development activities.
